channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: What we’ve learned building cloud agents
item.description: After a year of shipping cloud agents, we’ve learned that environment quality, durable execution, and the right harness boundaries drive autonomous performance.

item.title: Introducing organizations for Cursor Enterprise
item.description: Organizations let enterprises manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with separate budgets, security, governance, and feature controls.

item.title: Direct agents with visual prompts in Design Mode
item.description: Point, draw, or narrate UI changes in the browser while agents edit the code underneath.
